rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers most of the agreed active set, but there is one drift in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the policy's decision features partially overlap with X).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
